name: xurl
description: Official X (Twitter) API CLI from the xdevplatform team. Comprehensive coverage: posts, replies, quotes, DMs, media upload, search, timelines, social graph, bookmarks, streaming. Multiple auth methods (OAuth 2.0, 1.0a, app-only). Gold-standard security documentation for agent credential handling.
review: Highest-scoring skill in this batch. Official first-party X API CLI from xdevplatform. Exceptional security documentation — explicit forbidden flags list, credential handling rules, and agent session safety guidance. Gold standard for secure credential design in agent skills. Comprehensive coverage of all X API v2 endpoints.
